description: Nimbus Technologies has acquired CloudNova. Integrate their blog content into the main Nimbus WordPress site by importing the export file located at /home/ga/Documents/cloudnova_export.xml. Create a new Author account with the username cloudnova_archive and email archive@nimbustech.com, then assign all imported posts to this user. Create a new category named 'CloudNova Acquisition' and assign it to the three published posts ('Welcome to CloudNova', '5 Tips for Cloud Security', and 'Scaling Microservices Architecture') while ensuring they retain their original categories. Permanently delete the imported draft titled 'Draft: Internal Q3 Strategy' from the database. Update the 'Welcome to CloudNova' post to be sticky and change its publish date to today's date in the year 2026.
